name: Registry Browser
description: Public content browsing for a design registry. Search, filter, and explore patterns, themes, blueprints, archetypes, recipes, and shells.

page_briefs.registry: Search-first browsing page. Search bar with filter chips for content type (patterns, themes, blueprints, etc.) at the top. Below, a card grid of content items showing name, namespace badge, description preview, and tag pills.
page_briefs.registry-type: Filtered registry view for a specific content type. Same search and filter bar layout as main registry page, pre-filtered to the selected type. Card grid below with type-specific metadata on each card.
page_briefs.registry-detail: Content detail page. Hero card at top with item name, namespace badge, version, description, and tags. Below, a JSON viewer showing the full content schema with syntax highlighting.

shells.topbar-main: Top navigation bar with main content area
